rule_text: General reimbursement is NOT allowed for Remedy 03 unless an explicit benefit or rule row grants reimbursement for that specific service.
Emergency medical treatment within the UAE can be reimbursed outside network based on plan terms.
Eligible claims outside the UAE within the covered territory are reimbursed at 100 percent based on UAE designated network UCR rates or actual incurred cost whichever is lower.
Alternative medical treatment is available on reimbursement basis only up to AED 1500 per person per year with 30 percent coinsurance.
Repatriation of mortal remains is covered on reimbursement basis up to AED 5000 per person per year.
